---
title: "RespiCast Backtest Evaluation"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    code_folding: hide
params:
  tables_dir: "forecasts/retrospective/evaluation/tables"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  comment = NA
)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)

tables_dir <- params$tables_dir
if (!dir.exists(tables_dir) && dir.exists(file.path("..", tables_dir))) {
  tables_dir <- file.path("..", tables_dir)
}

read_required <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop("Missing required file: ", path, ". Run ./run/eval_backtest.sh first.")
  }
  read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

meta <- read_required(file.path(tables_dir, "evaluation_metadata.csv"))
recent_overall <- read_required(file.path(tables_dir, "recent_overall.csv"))
recent_per_horizon <- read_required(file.path(tables_dir, "recent_per_horizon.csv"))
season_overall <- read_required(file.path(tables_dir, "season_overall.csv"))
season_per_horizon <- read_required(file.path(tables_dir, "season_per_horizon.csv"))

fmt_tbl <- function(df) {
  out <- df
  num_cols <- names(out)[vapply(out, is.numeric, logical(1))]
  for (nm in setdiff(num_cols, c("horizon", "n_units", "rank"))) {
    out[[nm]] <- round(out[[nm]], 3)
  }
  pretty_names <- c(
    horizon = "Horizon (weeks ahead)",
    team_id = "Team",
    model_id = "Model ID",
    model = "Model",
    mean_wis = "Mean WIS",
    mean_ae = "Mean AE",
    mean_rel_wis_log2 = "Mean Relative Skill (log2 baseline/model)",
    n_units = "Scored Units",
    rank = "Rank"
  )
  old_names <- names(out)
  names(out) <- ifelse(old_names %in% names(pretty_names), pretty_names[old_names], old_names)
  out
}

render_target_tables <- function(df, title_prefix) {
  targets <- unique(df$target)
  htmltools::tagList(lapply(targets, function(tgt) {
    sub <- df %>% filter(target == tgt) %>% select(-target)
    htmltools::tagList(
      tags$h3(paste0(title_prefix, " - ", tgt)),
      DT::datatable(
        fmt_tbl(sub),
        rownames = FALSE,
        class = "stripe hover order-column compact",
        options = list(
          pageLength = 15,
          autoWidth = TRUE,
          scrollX = TRUE
        )
      )
    )
  }))
}
```

Generated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")`

## Evaluation Window

```{r metadata}
meta_pretty <- meta %>%
  rename(
    `Backtest Start Origin Date` = start_origin_date,
    `Last Evaluated Origin Date` = last_origin_date,
    `Recent Window Start Date` = recent_start_date,
    `Recent Window Length (weeks)` = recent_weeks,
    `Baseline Model` = baseline_model,
    `Total Scored Units` = n_scored_units
  )
knitr::kable(
  meta_pretty,
  format = "html",
  align = "l",
  table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-condensed'"
)
```

## Season Overall

```{r season-overall}
render_target_tables(season_overall, "Season Overall")
```

## Recent Overall

```{r recent-overall}
render_target_tables(recent_overall, "Recent Overall")
```

## Season Per Horizon

```{r season-per-horizon}
render_target_tables(season_per_horizon, "Season Per Horizon")
```

## Recent Per Horizon

```{r recent-per-horizon}
render_target_tables(recent_per_horizon, "Recent Per Horizon")
```
